title: Art of War 2026 Daily Ledger Counter-Review Active — 2026-05-19
human_verdict: Prompt loaded. Candidate file locked. Review vector focuses on turning daily noise into receipt-backed civic record. Public lane remains candidate-only and unbadged. Counter-review should inspect integrity, pattern continuity, threat surface, and Art of War alignment before the daily entry advances.

review_vectors.integrity_check: Verify daily ledger candidate and resolver counter-review files against stated commits.
review_vectors.pattern_map: Compare today's candidate against prior Art of War 2026 receipts and detect escalation vectors, narrative traps, or power shifts.
review_vectors.threat_surface_scan: Identify external noise or framing that may corrupt, dilute, or overstate the record.
review_vectors.art_of_war_alignment: Assess whether the candidate advances position, protects boundaries, clarifies evidence, or exposes weak flanks.

strengths: Consistent daily discipline builds durable public memory over time.
Resolver closed and counter-review pointer archived, creating clean handoff.
Claim tag PUBLIC_AS_CANDIDATE_LANE keeps the daily lane agile and bounded.
risks: External narrative noise can dilute focus if not reduced to receipts.
Premature badge or public proof claims would weaken the lane.
Daily candidate needs explicit position and counter-position sections to remain operational rather than decorative.
recommended_next_moves: Harden the daily candidate with explicit Own Position and Counter-Pressure sections.
Keep public badge, legal authority, and onchain claims false until separate receipts exist.
Repeat daily ritual: prompt -> candidate -> counter-review -> archive.
Create final daily candidate-entry review receipt before any public promotion.

language_normalization.reason: Some source rhetoric used conflict-heavy phrasing. Archived receipt preserves the strategic review intent while keeping public civic framing non-violent and governance-bounded.
language_normalization.public_doctrine_approved_language: Zero Trust external review; maximum evidence density in the ledger.

canon_line: Daily candidate locked. Counter-review active. Fog turns into receipts one day at a time.
